seoTitle: Cushnie vs Cutella — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cushnie and Cutella. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cushnie and Cutella.
heading: Cushnie vs Cutella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cushnie, Queensland and Cutella, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cushnie has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Cutella (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cushnie or Cutella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cushnie has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cutella scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cushnie scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Cutella scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cushnie or Cutella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cushnie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
